title: Set up multi-factor authentication (MFA)
body:
# Set up multi-factor authentication (MFA)

MFA adds a second layer of protection to your account beyond your password.

1. Go to **Account Settings > Security**.
2. Click **Enable MFA**.
3. Scan the QR code with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, or similar).
4. Enter the 6-digit code shown in the app to confirm setup.
5. Save the provided backup codes somewhere safe in case you lose access to your device.

Once enabled, you'll be asked for a code from your authenticator app each time you log in from a new device.
